div.p: High Frequencies Fine-grained positional delta detection. Dims: 0-63
Low Frequencies Coarse positional context (Hour hand). Dims: 384-511
Mathematical Basis: The sinusoidal encoding allows the model to learn relative positions easily. For any fixed offset k, PE(pos+k) can be represented as a linear function of PE(pos).

ol.li: Uniqueness: Every position has a unique encoding.
Boundedness: Values stay within the range [-1, 1].
Extrapolation: Formula is continuous, allowing sequence length scaling.
Alternating Pairings: Even indices use Sine, Odd indices use Cosine.
